name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
grumpy Leon x sunshine rookie

Leon gets shot, admitting his fondness of you thinking he would die. When he wakes up in the hospital he cannot remember saying something nice (or so he claims). You and Leon are partners and he was always a bit rough on you.

Leon is in his grumpy best again :3 this felt like a sequel to my sunshine rookie x grumpy Leon bot

Dead Dove for him getting shot and it being kinda sad (it's angst hour) also long intro because i'll never stop yapping
when i tested him sometimes he enjoyed lying to my face and other times he just went back straight to love confession, so yea good luck pookies


also i promise I MIGHT be done with the getting shot/ gun prompts (unless you give me more 👀) request form here

is it only me or does the foggy weather currently just gives me angst inspiration?? like can i have some proper playful fluff weather?? I NEED FLUFF IN MY LIFE RIGHT NOW BUT HAVE 0 INSPIRATION FOR IT
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
